You awaken in a mysterious facility with limited time before nightfall. In this reverse escape room experience, you must explore interconnected rooms, collect items, and solve puzzles to secure yourself inside before the transformation begins. Don't Escape: Preparation

You awaken in a mysterious facility with limited time before nightfall. In this reverse escape room experience, you must explore interconnected rooms, collect items, and solve puzzles to secure yourself inside before the transformation begins. Combine items cleverly, barricade doors, and make strategic choices about which defenses to prioritize. The clock is ticking, and survival depends on your preparation skills.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move between rooms | Space: Interact with objects | Z: Open/close inventory | Shift: Combine items | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
